snippet.title: ROSÉ - 'On The Ground' M/V
snippet.description:
On The Ground

My life's been magic seems fantastic
I used to have a hole in the wall with a mattress
It’s funny when you want it
Suddenly you have it
You find out that your gold’s just plastic

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down

I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

My world’s been hectic seems electric
But I’ve been waking up with your voice in my head
And I’m trying to send a message
And let you know that every single minute I’m without you I regret it

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down
I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

I’m way up in the clouds
And they say I’ve made it now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the ground

Just drove by your house
So far from you now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though

On the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though
Everything I need is on the ground

snippet.title: Gokuldham वासी हुए घर में बंद! - Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashma-तारक मेहता- Ep 3121-12th March, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/bhogilal-calls-the-police-1000110953?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3121: Bhogilal Tries To Run Away
---------------------------------------------------------
Bhogilal locked Everyone inside Jethalal's house and called the police. Bhogilal tries to run away but someone from Gokuldham has punctured his car and while Bhogilal and his lawyer reach the society's main gate Tapu Sena caught him. Can Jethalal save his Land and money?  Watch the full episode now.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Chambdi Baba Bhagaye Bhoot | RajKummar Rao | Janhvi Kapoor | Varun Sharma | Ashish Chanchlani
snippet.description:
Lo bhai aa gaya humara ek aur bollywood collab after ages
Roohi is releasing on 11th March
ONLY AND ONLY IN CINEMAS
JAANA AUR ZAROOR DEKHNA
Bhai maza aa gaya ye waale video mein kyunki apne iss video mein hai Rajkummar bhaiya, Varun bhai aur Janhvi Kapoor
Toh hum log jab goa mein apni mara rahe the tab apne @JioStudios  aur @Maddock Films  waalo ne apne ko bola ki bhai ek acha saa video bana na hai roohi ke star cast ke saath, waise toh bollywood collabs karna kaafi kamm kar diye hai (time nai re abhi ACV team ke paas, kaun mumbai jaye Ulhasnagar se😂😂) lekin ye waali star cast mein apne Raj bhai hai, jo actor ke roop mein kuch zyada hi ache insaan hai❤️ aur Varun Sharma ke saath toh apna pehle rishta tha
Toh hum mana nai kar paye
Plus Janhvi pe apun ko crush tha 😂😂
Upar se film ke producer Dinesh Vijan bhi kaafi respectful aur pyaare the, toh jab bhi bollywood se ache humble log milte (jo rare hota hai😂😂) humara dil kehta ki inke saath toh kaam karna hi chahiye
Islie bas humne kuch darawani movies dekhi apne bhootiyapa ko badaya aur ye script likhi jo hai chambdi baba ka part 2
Ye waala video end tak zaroor dekhna kyunki isme bahut masti hai aur kaafi zyada improvisation hai (all thanks to legend RAJKUMMAR RAO)
Production :
@Jashan Sirwani  , @Tanish Sirwani  , @Ritesh Sadhwani  toh hamesha hi hote hai
Is baar @Rohit Sadhwani  aur Grishim bhi chale kyunki bollywood ka collab tha, waise harami ke bache 2 din call nai uthate 
Main ek whatsapp kiya ki Rajkummar Rao se milne jaa rahe
Ghar ke neeche pahuch gaye saale
Iski script maine aur @Jashan Sirwani  ne saath mein likhi hai kyunki @Kunal Chhabhria  mc ko Ambernath se Ulhasnagar aane mein bhi bahut time lagta hai
Traffic ne dhanda kharab kar diya hai
Shoot humara Cinderella @Siddharth Kedare aur @Kunal Chhabhria ne kiya kyunki camera inke paas girvi rehta hai... bhadepe chalate hai aur kamate hai, mujhse paise nahi lete hai iss liye inko jhelna padta hai.
Baaki humara super super thanks to
Jio Studios jinhone hume phone karke ijjat di😂
Maddock films jinhone saamne se humari ijjat cheeni nahi😂
Rajkummar Rao jinse bahut saari cheeze seekhni ko mili, jaise ki jitna zyada talented banda utna kam ghamand🔥
Varun Sharma jinki comic timing aur expression meri acting distract kar rahi thi
Aur Janhvi Kapoor jinki maine raj bhai aur Varun bhai ne bahuuut taang kheechi 😂😂
All in all maza aa gaya please ye movie cinemas ke jaake zaroor dekhna
ROOHI IS RELEASING ON 11TH MARCH❤️

#Roohi #11thMarch #AshishChanchlani #RajKummarRao #JanhviKapoor #VarunSharma #MaddockFilms #JioStudios

snippet.title: MUTTON BONE MARROW | Chettinad Mutton Bone Marrow Cooking and Eating in Village | Mutton Recipes
snippet.description:
Today in our village, we cook 100+ mutton bone marrow with the traditional Chettinad method. Mutton bone marrow is one of the tastiest piece in the mutton recipe. 

We collect a huge amount of bone marrow to make this mutton recipe.

We enjoy this traditionally cooked mutton bone recipe with our mutton gravy.

snippet.title: Feel the Power -Yuvarathnaa(Kannada) | Puneeth Rajkumar | Santhosh Ananddram | Hombale Films
snippet.description:
Presenting 'Feel the Power', a lyrical video song, from Puneeth Rajkumar's upcoming Kannada film 'Yuvarathnaa', Directed by Santhosh Ananddram, Music by Thaman S, Produced by Vijay Kiragandur under Hombale Films. 

Watch and listen to this energetic and unforgettable track composed by Thaman S that'll make you 'Feel The Power.'

Putting up a pompous show led by Puneeth Rajkumar, Jaani Master's style will keep you hooked to the screen. With a perky musical score, Feel The Power shall mark a new era.  
Shashank Sheshagiri's voice, Santhosh Ananddram's lyrics will leave you with a fantastic experience. 

See, Share, and make it a part of your music playlists! Get a load of more such Kannada videos, Kannada songs, and Kannada cinema updates by subscribing to Hombale Films YouTube Channel.
http://bit.ly/SubscribetoHombaleFilms

snippet.title: क्या Jetha का Plan होगा कामयाब? - Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah-तारक मेहता -Ep 3118-9thMarch, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/bhogilal-arrives-1000110505?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3118: Will Jetha's Plan Be Successful?
---------------------------------------------------------
Bhogilal is in the Gada household and is in talks with Champaklal and Taarak regarding the property's paper with Sunder looking over the deal. Whilst talking, Champaklal mistakenly utters the Gada surname. This forces him to weave a story of his own to remove any doubts in Bhogilal's mind. At the same time, the other members of the society and waiting for Bhogilal to fall into Jetha's trap. Watch the full episode to find out.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Punjab schools to shut again
snippet.description:
ਚੰਡੀਗੜ੍ਹ : ਪੰਜਾਬ ‘ਚ ਕੋਰੋਨਾ ਵਾਇਰਸ ਦੇ ਮਾਮਲੇ ਇਕ ਵਾਰ ਫਿਰ ਵਧਣੇ ਸ਼ੁਰੂ ਹੋ ਗਈ ਹੈ। ਜਿਸ ਕਰਕੇ ਪੰਜਾਬ ਸਰਕਾਰ ਨੇ ਮੁੜ ਸੂਬੇ ਵਿੱਚ ਸਖ਼ਤੀ ਕਰ ਦਿੱਤੀ ਹੈ। ਅਜਿਹੇ ‘ਚ ਪੰਜਾਬ ਸਿੱਖਿਆ ਵਿਭਾਗ ਵੱਲੋਂ ਵੀ ਪੰਜਾਬ ਦੇ ਸਕੂਲਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਮੁੜ ਤਾਲਾ ਲਗਾਉਣ ਦਾ ਫ਼ੈਸਲਾ ਲਿਆ ਗਿਆ ਹੈ।

Read more: https://bit.ly/3te3qBa

#PunjabSchools #Punjab #Covid19Punjab #PunjabNews #CoronavirusPunjab #PreparatoryLeaves

snippet.title: AJAY HOODA : TU GORI MAI KALA | Arvind J, Rashalika | Deepesh | New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021
snippet.description:
Ajay Hooda New Song, White Hill Dhaakad presents New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021 "Tu Gori Mai Kala" by Arvind Jangid. Starring Ajay Hooda, Rashalika Sabharwal. Lyrics by Ajay Hooda. Music by Arvind Jangid. Video by Deepesh Goyal. Produced By Gunbir Singh Sidhu & Manmord Sidhu. In this song, the boy falls in love with a girl but he hesitates to express his feelings because they have nothing in common. Subscribe to our channel to listen to New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021.

snippet.title: Above All (Official Video) Jassa Dhillon | Gur Sidhu | New Punjabi Song 2021 | Punjabi Songs
snippet.description:

Enjoy And Stay Connected With Artist || Gur Sidhu
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/GurSidhuInsta​​
Facebook : https://facebook.com/gursidhuofficial​​
Snapchat: https://snapchat.com/add/igursidhu​​
Twitter : https://twitter.com/gursidhuinsta​

Lyrics:

Kon kahinda jatt maade aa hunde,
Vair paye maade bass jatta de,
Chande aa gandase rahinde,
Bulliya te haase rahinde,
Gaira vich khof rahinda,
Khade velly paase rahinde , 
utre dunaali vicho chopra te charde,

Arde ni gabbru ta jahra vicho vadd de,
Yaar te pyaar piche moohre hoke lad de,
Harde na yaar sohniye raule mukde na hunde kade vatta de,
Kon kahinda jatt maade aa , hunde vair paye maade bass jatta de,


Ucchiya udaariya ,niviya farrariya,
Dass keda sher jithe mallan naio mariya,
24x 7 lohr aa ni vakhri g tohr aa,
Ni nave terе shehar ch puraanya te jor aa,
Bharde na takk balliyе vajj de aa fair jado patta te,
Kon kahinda jatt maade aa , 
hunde vair paye maade bass jatta de


Gur Sidhu Music
Tattiya taseera ne , piche piche heera ne,
Sadde utte hath kude pakkya fakeera de,
Pale aa tufana vich , jamme aa mayan vich,
Tikkhe nale tez kude jive shamsheera ne,
Banya vajood sada todya ni jana,
Haqqa piche lade jatt modya ni,
Vakap ne saare keda janda ni dhillon nu,
Gutt kabbi khana toh marodya ni jana ,
pahila jede saan vajde , 
picho chalde bhaar kahinde latta te,
Kon kahinda jatt maade aa ,
hunde vair paaye maade bass jatta de,


Dass keda aa vangarda , hune jatt thalda,
Mosam de saab naa ldaayi munda bhalda,
Mare na zameer kyoki ziddi jatt jyonde ne,
Ginti ch nio heere gaddara ch aunde ne,
Mode arrbi bandook awe teda takk na,
Kammm hustle aundi jithe aunda lakh na,
Jado jado jatt jud Saab lagde ne bottla de datta de , 
kon kahinda jatt maade aa , 
hunde vair paaye maade bs jatta de.

kon kahinda jatt maade aa , 
hunde vair paaye maade bs jatta de.

snippet.title: महाशिवरात्रि की रात ये गलती न करें | Don't Do This Mistake | Sadhguru Hindi
snippet.description:
इस महाशिवरात्रि पर सद्गुरु 10 लाख से ज़्यादा रुद्राक्ष प्राण-प्रतिष्ठित करेंगे। यह रुद्राक्ष और दूसरी सामग्रियां सभी साधकों को फ्री भेंट की जाएंगी, जिससे उन्हें साधना में मदद मिलेगी। रुद्राक्ष प्राप्त करने के लिए इस लिंक पर जाकर रजिस्टर करें : https://isha.co/Rudraksh-Hin

एक योगी, युगदृष्टा, मानवतावादी, सद्‌गुरु एक आधुनिक गुरु हैं, जिनको योग के प्राचीन विज्ञान पर पूर्ण अधिकार है। विश्व शांति और खुशहाली की दिशा में निरंतर काम कर रहे सद्‌गुरु के रूपांतरणकारी कार्यक्रमों से दुनिया के करोडों लोगों को एक नई दिशा मिली है। दुनिया भर में लाखों लोगों को आनंद के मार्ग में दीक्षित किया गया है। 

सद्‌गुरु एप्प डाउनलोड करें 📲
http://onelink.to/sadhguru__app

ईशा फाउंडेशन हिंदी ब्लॉग
http://isha.sadhguru.org/hindi

सद्‌गुरु का ओफ़िशिअल हिंदी फेसबुक चैनल
http://www.facebook.com/SadhguruHindi

सद्‌गुरु का ओफ़िशिअल हिंदी Telegram ग्रुप जॉइन करें 
https://t.me/joinchat/Md1ldBSkRhCIANVu80OSDA

सद्‌गुरु का नि:शुल्क ध्यान ईशा क्रिया सीखने के लिए:
http://hindi.ishakriya.com

snippet.title: Jetha ने निकाली कुत्ते की नक़ल -Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah-तारक मेहता- Ep 3119 -10th March, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/bapuji-signs-the-papers-1000110700?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3119: Jetha Barks Like A Dog
---------------------------------------------------------
With Bhogilal and Champaklal getting the land deal sorted out in the drawing-room, the Gokuldham members are growing restless waiting in the kitchen and the bedroom. In the ensuing chaos, there's a loud noise from the bedroom. Champaklal says that he has kept a dog locked up in the bedroom. Hearing this, Jethalal is forced to bark like a dog so as to avoid any suspicions from Bhogilal. Watch the full episode now.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Flying Alone In Emirates First Class🔥🔥🔥
snippet.description:
Namaskaar Dosto, yeh ek bahut hi shandaar video hai jaha pe maine aapse baat ki hai mere ultimate experience ki Emirates First Class mein, yaha pe main akela passenger tha poori First Class mein jaha pe maine share kiya mera travelling experience Delhi se Dubai tak aur maine Emirates First Class mein Internet speed bhi check ki jaha pe satellite internet ki bhi bahut kamaal speeds thi. Mujhe umeed hai ki aapko yeh ek shandaar aur exclusive content hamesha ki tareh ek alag experience provide karega Emirates First Class ka. Mujhe umeed hai ki aapko yeh video pasand aayegi.

snippet.title: Missamma || Episode - 4 || Vaishnavi Chaitanya || Arjun Kalyan || Infinitum Media
snippet.description:
From the creators of #softwaredevloveper comes a story of innocence, gumption and redemption. Follow and enjoy the journey of "Mahalakshmi" as she traverses through life's emotions with grit and panache. 

"Missamma" is a Telugu  Web Series Featuring Vaishnavi Chaitanya, Arjun Kalyan & Avinash Reddy Anam

Cast:- Vaishnavi Chaitanya, Arjun Kalyan, Avinash Reddy Anam, Ashwini, Mounica, Satish, Sathwik G Roy, 

Directed by Venkat Rdy ( Naani )

Written - Prashanth Babu Ragathi

Editing :- Shiva Pavan

DI :- Raj Krish

Cinematography  - Bhanu Prakash Musmuri

Sound engineer - Vamshi Vinod Nalli ( Nani )

Title and Poster designer - Nikhil Concepts

Title Animation :- Konte Pavan kumar   

Executive Producer - Sri Vidya P 

Line Producer - Rishi Reddy

Music - Srujan Shashanka

Gimbal Operator - Prashanth Narala

Producer : Infinitum Media

#VaishnaviChaitanya is known for her music videos and cover songs and for acting in the Blockbuster Movie "Ala Vaikunta Puram Lo"

" Vaishnavi Chaitanya is a Telugu comedy & Entertainment Youtube Content Creator &  Actor at Telugu Film Industry

This is produced by Infinitum media.

#Missamma

snippet.title: CID MOOSA | PRAGATHI
snippet.description:
'CID MOOSA' An evergreen comical box office hit in Malayalam film industry. The whole plot took us for a roller coaster of fun and laughter. Cinemas were filled with roaring laughs watching the Hollywood flicks of super characters , funky cars and wits of MOOSA . The surprising musical arrangements of the film have amused all of us and are still in our playlist . Here PRAGATHI comes up with a reprise of the epic song KAADIRANGI . Go watch ,enjoy and repeat 🔁 

Pragathi

KS Harisankar ( Vocals)
Precious Peter (Keys)
Abin Sagar (Guitars)
Abhijith Sudhi (Bass)
Abishek Amanath (Drums)

Original Song Credits

Lyrics - Gireesh Puthancheri
Music - Vidyasagar
Singer- V Devanand, Prathap, Timmi & Tippu
Movie - CID Moosa

Recorded & Mixed By Sai Prakash @My Studio, Kochi
Mastered By Balu Thankachan @20db Sound Studios, Chennai

Produced By BOLDOVA PRODUCTIONS

Director Of Photography - Naveen Chempodi

Screenplay - KS Harisankar

Editor- Renjit Varma

D.I -  Arjun Menon

Art Director - Jayan Crayon

Stills- Nirmal Gylson

Project Manager- Ghadha Sidharthan

snippet.title: Zomato Delivery Boy Explained | Tamil | Madan Gowri | MG
snippet.description:
Join Special MG Squad: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCY6KjrDBN_tIRFT_QNqQbRQ/join
--------------
This Madan Gowri video is a video about a Zomato delivery boy in Bangalore that became big viral news, regarding delayed delivery of food. We will be fact-checking what really the story behind the Zomato delivery boy and the Bangalore customer girl if it was really, was about delivery food delay.

snippet.title: BAWAAL (Official Video) | MJ5 | Latest Song 2021
snippet.description:
MJ5 Entertainment presents Artist “MJ5” with their first debut single and official music video “Bawaal. After this long journey as a dance crew, with your love and support, we are now here as the “First Indian Boy Band”. The singers are none other than the band members Kartik, Rohit, and Dennis. We wish to spread the happy fun vibe for “MJ5ers” and all the people out there who are going through something and need a pick me up. “Ek hi Zindagi hai guys, thodi masti aur maaza toh hona hi chahiye – Cheers to life”.

We hope you all like it :) 

#Bawaal #MJ5

Produced & Conceptualised by - Nitish R Kumar

Song  - Bawaal
Singer - Kartik, Rohit & Dennis
Music - Dixant
Lyrics - Nitish & Dixant

snippet.title: Dhee ft. Arivu - Enjoy Enjaami (Prod. Santhosh Narayanan)
snippet.description:
Enjoy Enjaami  - Available now https://music.maajja.com/enjoyenjaami

Artist: Dhee ft. Arivu
Producer: Santhosh Narayanan
Director: Amith Krishnan (Studio MOCA)
Produced by: maajja 

Music video by Dhee and Arivu performing Enjoy Enjaami. (C) 2021 maajja inc.

Follow Dhee: https://www.instagram.com/dhee___
Follow Arivu: https://www.instagram.com/therukural
Follow Santhosh Narayanan: https://www.instagram.com/musicsanthosh
Follow maajja: https://www.instagram.com/joinmaajja
Follow Studio MOCA: https://www.instagram.com/moca.studio

Lyrics:
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Thaatha thaatha kala vetti
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Pondhula yaaru meen koththi
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Thanniyil odum thavalaikki
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Kambali poochi thangachi 

Allimalar kodi angadhame
Ottara ottara sandhaname
Mullai malar kodi muththaarame
Engooru engooru kuththaalame

Surukku paiyamma
Veththala mattaiyamma
Somandha kaiyamma
Maththalam kottuyamma
Thaaiyamma thaaiyamma
Enna panna maayamma 
Valliamma peraandi
Sangadhiya kellendi
Kannaadiya kaanaamdi 
Indhaarraa peraandi

Annakkili annakkili 
Adi aalamarakkela vannakkili
Nallapadi vaazhacholli 
Indha manna koduthaane
Poorvakudi
Kammaankara kaaniyellaam
Paadith thirinjaane
Aadhikkudi
Naayi nari 
Poonaikundhan
Indha erikkolam kooda sondhammadi 

Enjoy, enjaami 
vaango vaango onnaagi
Amma yi ambaari 
Indha indha mummaari

Cuckoo cuckoo...
Muttaiya podum kozhikku 
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Oppanai yaaru maiyilukku 
Cuckoo cuckoo
Pachchaiya poosum paasikku
Cuckoo cuckoo
Kuchchiya adukkuna kootukku 

Paadu patta makka 
Varappu mettukkaara
Vervathanni sokkaa 
Minukkum naattukkaara
Aakaatti karuppatti
Oodhaangolu mannuchatti
Aathoram koodukatti
Arambichcha naagareegam
Jhan jhana jhanakku jhana makkale
Uppuku chappu kottu
Muttaikulla saththukottu
Attaikku raththangkottu
Kittipullu vettu vettu

Naan anju maram valarthen...
Azhagana thottam vachchen...
Thottam sezhithaalum en thonda 
nanaiyalaye

En kadale karaye...
Vaname saname...
Nelame kolame...
Edame thadame...

Enjoy, enjaami 
vaango vaango onnaagi
Amma yi ambaari 
Indha indha mummaari

Paattan poottan kaaththa boomi
aatam pottu kaattum saami 
Raatinandha suththi vandha
Seva koovuchu
Adhu pottu vachcha echamdhaane
Kaada maarichu
Namma naada maarichu 
Indha veeda maarichu

Enna kora enna kora
En seeni karumbukku enna kora 
Enna kora enna kora
En chella peraandikku enna kora

Pandhalulla paavarka...
Pandhalulla paavarka
Vedhakallu vitturukku...
Vedhakallu vitturukku
Appan aathaa vittadhungo
Appan aathaa vittandhungo

Ah.....

Enjoy, enjaami 
vaango vaango onnaagi
Amma yi ambaari 
Indha indha mummaari

#Dhee | #Arivu | #EnjoyEnjaami

snippet.description:
Vaadi Rasathi channel link : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4uAq6-yliOc

Veyilon Entertainment proudly presents, A New Sitcom "ENNACHI?"

This sitcom takes on a rollercoaster ride revolving four induviduals and their lives. 

In this first episode by accepting challenge of his friend sathish, karthick a boy of innocence proposes a girl who use to be his long  time crush. To find out what happens next watch this "ENNACHI?" episode-1.

Like, comment, share and subscribe veyilon.

snippet.title: రేపే శని మాఘ అమావాస్య స్నానంచేసే నీటిలో ఈ ఒక్కటి వేసుకొని చేస్తే అష్టదరిద్రాలు,పాపాలు పోయి కోటిజన్మల
snippet.description:
రేపే శని మాఘ అమావాస్య స్నానంచేసే నీటిలో ఈ ఒక్కటి వేసుకొని చేస్తే అష్టదరిద్రాలు,పాపాలు పోయి కోటిజన్మల.

snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 06 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 12th March 2021

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher

Composer: Naveed Nashad

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

Rae tanae dhokhe aali foonk tae bujayi baati rae
baat kari ghani tanae taati taati rae
maada tame dekh kae nae kalaa chhod diya
reha koni yaar ka aaj koye sathi rae
rae kuchh reha bhi ni baaki ghani khelgi chalaaki
ib kis nae bta de badnaam kah du mae

rae dhokha tera bhi nhi hain dhokha mera bhi nahi hain
ib kis nae bta de ilzaam dedu main

rae tanae dhokhe aala teer sidha maarya chhati main
rae nash nash main terae dhokha bharya
jhoothi saachi baat manae maani saari saachi rae
tere chakkar main aake manae kaand tha karya
teri baat saari jaali teri baat thi rae jaali
kisne bta de tera naam dedu main

rae dhokha tera bhi nhi hain dhokha mera bhi nahi hain
ib kis nae bta de ilzaam dedu main

rae maade aala krishan bhukha pyar ka tha
bas dhokha bharya teri neet main
tanae pyar aali baaji khwli dhokae tai
usne samajh baithi jeet rae
anil agarwal kare pyar aaj bhi
rae roj tere naam ka ek jaam dedu main

rae dhokha tera bhi nhi hain dhokha mera bhi nahi hain
ib kis nae bta de ilzaam dedu main

Watch your favorite serials Free on Sun NXT, immediately after TV. Offer Valid till 25th Mar 2021

Poove Unakkaga is a drama serial on Sun TV. Poovarasi and Keerthy share a heart-warming bond of friendship and hope to stay friends forever. Poovarasi promises her mother that she won’t fall-in-love with anyone, but often dreams about a mysterious man. By a stroke of fate, he happens to be Kathir, a rich and handsome young man who falls in love with Keerthy at first sight. Watch this refreshing tale of love and friendship to know more.

snippet.title: ആഴക്കടൽ മീൻ പിടിത്തം!! | Deep Sea Fishing Kerala
snippet.description:
കടൽ മച്ചാൻ വിഷ്ണുവിന്റെ ചാനൽ ആണ് 😍 https://youtu.be/IoRFQI8vlY0 വിഷ്ണുവിന്റെ ചാനലിൽ അന്ന് വിഷ്ണു എടുത്ത വീഡിയോ ഉടനെ വരും ഇവിടെ കാണാത്തത് അവിടെ ഉണ്ടാവും 😍👌 https://youtube.com/c/KadalMachanByVishnuAzheekal

Visit our website:https://fishingfreaks.in

Click here to Subscribe:- https://bit.ly/2wtRgMR

1.Part-1 കടൽ പന്നിയോ..കൊമ്പൻ സ്രാവോ പിടിച്ചില്ലങ്കിൽ നാളെ കാണാം😂-https://youtu.be/MjgQAC5mD9Y

2.Part -2 കടൽ പാമ്പും..അനാകോണ്ടയും..പിടിച്ചില്ല 😂 നേരം വെളുത്തു☺️-https://youtu.be/t_KpCeJmpmI

ในรายการ RELEASED ตอนนี้ ROSÉ ทดสอบว่าเพื่อนๆ รู้จักเธอดีแค่ไหน ศิลปินคนไหนที่เธอชอบฟัง และการแสดงเดี่ยวกับเครื่องดนตรีหลากหลาย รับชม RELEASED ทุกวันพฤหัสบดี เฉพาะทาง YouTube #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

ko.title: ROSÉ의 “On The Ground” | RELEASED 첫 공개 카운트다운 (전체 에피소드)
ko.description:
ROSÉ의 새로운 뮤직비디오 "On The Ground"를 지금 시청하세요 https://youtu.be/CKZvWhCqx1s
이번 RELEASED 에피소드에서는 ROSÉ가 친구들이 ROSÉ를 얼마나 잘 아는지, 플레이리스트에 어떤 아티스트가 있는지를 테스트하고 다양한 악기로 솔로 공연을 합니다. 매주 목요일 오직 YouTube에서 RELEASED를 만나보세요. #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

id.title: ROSÉ "On The Ground" | Hitung Mundur Premier di RELEASED (Episode Lengkap)
id.description: Tonton video musik terbaru ROSÉ, “On The Ground”, sekarang https://youtu.be/CKZvWhCqx1s Pada episode RELEASED kali ini, ROSÉ menguji seberapa baik teman-temannya mengenalnya, siapa artis yang ada di daftar putarnya, tampil solo dengan berbagai instrumen. RELEASED, tiap Kamis hanya di YouTube. #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ #OnTheGround

pt-BR.title: ROSÉ “On The Ground” | Contagem Regressiva para a Estreia no RELEASED (Episódio Completo)
pt-BR.description:
Assista ao novo clipe da ROSÉ, “On The Ground”, agora https://youtu.be/CKZvWhCqx1s
Neste episódio de RELEASED, ROSÉ testa o quanto seus amigos a conhecem, revela quais artistas estão em sua playlist e toca solos com vários instrumentos. RELEASED, toda quinta, só no YouTube. #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

es-419.title: ROSÉ “On The Ground” | Cuenta regresiva para el estreno en RELEASED (episodio completo)
es-419.description:
Mira el nuevo video musical de ROSÉ de "On the Ground" https://youtu.be/CKZvWhCqx1s
En este episodio de RELEASED, ROSÉ pone a prueba cuán bien la conocen sus amigos, cuáles artistas están en su lista de reproducción y realiza solos con varios instrumentos. RELEASED, cada jueves solo en YouTube. #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

ja.title: ROSÉ ロゼ “On The Ground” | まもなく「RELEASED」で初公開
ja.description:
ROSÉの新曲“On The Ground”のミュージックビデオをチェック！https://youtu.be/CKZvWhCqx1s
今週の「RELEASED」ではROSÉが登場し、友人がどれだけ自分を理解しているかテストをしたり、彼女のプレイリストの中身や様々な楽器を使ったソロ演奏などを披露します。「RELEASED」は毎週木曜日、YouTubeで独占配信。#RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

snippet.title: EXCLUSIVE: The Untold Journey Of Rishab Shetty | Sandalwood | Directed By ANUSHREE
snippet.description:
Click to Subscribe:- https://bit.ly/AnushreeAnchor
ಬಾಲ್ಯದ ನೆನಪುಗಳು, ಜೀವನದ ಸಂಘರ್ಷಗಳು, ಇನ್ನು ಎಷ್ಟೋ ಘಟನೆಗಳು.
It is time to hear the childhood memories, life's treacheries and many more eventful stories of the Kannada actor and Film-maker Rishab Shetty. In an exclusive interview directed by Anushree Anchor. What's more interesting here is his way of talks. Listen to his candid nature, speaking and sharing intriguing instances from his life. Gather moments of humour and a tinge of heartfulness from the latest Kannada interview. 
I hope you enjoy the episode, don’t forget to like, share and subscribe to my channel! 😉

Concept & Directed By: ANUSHREE
Content Creator: Nagendra Seethkal
DOP: Vasuki Karkone
Asst. DOP: Manju
Editor: Abhay
Production Designer: Varun

snippet.title: Veteran film actor Vijayaraghavan and vehicles he owns | Chat with Baiju N Nair
snippet.description:
നമ്മുടെ പ്രിയ നടൻ വിജയരാഘവന് പ്രിയം ടൊയോട്ട വാഹനങ്ങളാണ്.ഫോർച്ചുണറും  ഇന്നോവയുമടങ്ങുന്ന വിജയരാഘവന്റെ വാഹനലോകത്തിലൂടെ..
Follow me on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/baijunnairofficial Instagram:www.instagram.com/baijunnair
 Email:baijunnair@gmail.com 
വാർത്തകൾക്കും ടെസ്റ്റ് ഡ്രൈവ് റിപ്പോർട്ടുകൾക്കുമായി ഞങ്ങളുടെ വെബ്‌സൈറ്റ് സന്ദർശിക്കാം: 
http://www.smartdrivemag.com
#ActorVijayaraghavan #MalayalamFilm #AmalNeerad #NNPillai #MalayalamDrama #ToyotaFortuner #ToyotaInnova #MarutiBaleno #MarutiCiaz #BaijuNNair #MalayalamAutoVlog

snippet.title: Maroon 5 - Beautiful Mistakes ft. Megan Thee Stallion (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
“Beautiful Mistakes” featuring Megan Thee Stallion is out now: https://maroon5.lnk.to/BeautifulMistakes​
 
For more, visit: 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/maroon5​
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/maroon5​
Twitter: https://twitter.com/maroon5​
Sign up for updates: http://smarturl.it/Maroon5.News​ 

 // 
 
LYRICS
 
It’s beautiful it’s bittersweet
You’re like a broken home to me
I take a shot of memories and black out like an empty street
I fill my days with the way you walk
And fill my nights with broken dreams
I make up lies inside my head
Like one day you’ll come back to me

Now I’m not holding on
Not holding on
Not holding on
I’m just depressed that you’re gone
Not holding on 
Not holding on

Beautiful mistakes 
I make inside my head
She’s naked in my bed
And now we lie awake 
Making beautiful mistakes
I wouldn’t take em back
I’m in love with the past
And now we lie awake 
Making beautiful mistakes

Nah nah nah
In my head
Nah nah nah 
In my bed
Nah nah nah
Making beautiful mistakes 

It’s pitiful
I can’t believe how everyday gets worse for me 
I take a break, I cut you off
To keep myself from looking soft
I fill my nights with the way you was
And still wake up with broken dreams
I make these lies inside my head
Feel like they’re my reality 

Now I’m not holding on
Not holding on
Not holding on
I’m just depressed that you’re gone
Not holding on 
Not holding on

Beautiful mistakes 
I make inside my head
She’s naked in my bed
And now we lie awake 
Making beautiful mistakes
I wouldn’t take em back
I’m in love with the past
And now we lie awake 
Making beautiful mistakes

Nah nah nah
In my head
Nah nah nah 
In my bed
Nah nah nah
Making beautiful mistakes

You did me wrong cause I let you
Usually I like my situations beneficial
Doing something different
Got me looking stupid
The only way I’m coming back to you, is if you dream it
Lucid, Prove it
If you made a promise, then keep it
Why you wanna lie and then get mad, I don’t believe it
But really I was just doing fine without ya 
Looking fine, sippin’ wine, dancing on club couches  
Baby why you wanna lose me like you don’t need me
Like I don’t block you and you still try to reach me
How you figure out how to call from me from the TV
You runnin’ out of chances and this time I mean it (yeah)

Bet you miss my love, all in your bed
Now ya stressin’ out, pulling your hair
Smelling your pillows and wishin I was there 
Sliding down to shower wall looking sad
I know its hard to let go, I’m the best
Best you ever had and best you gonna get
If we break up I don’t wanna be friends, you’re toxic

Beautiful mistakes 
I make inside my head
She’s naked in my bed
And now we lie awake 
Making beautiful mistakes
I wouldn’t take em back
I’m in love with the past
And now we lie awake 
Making beautiful mistakes

Nah nah nah
In my head
Nah nah nah 
In my bed
Nah nah nah
Making beautiful mistakes 

Nah nah nah
In my head
Nah nah nah 
In my bed
Nah nah nah
Making beautiful mistakes 

Nah nah nah
Nah nah nah
Nah nah nah

#Maroon5​ #BeautifulMistakes​ #MeganTheeStallion

snippet.title: Pinjara Khubsurti Ka | पिंजरा खुबसूरती का | Episode 145 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
When Mayura prays in the temple for her daughter, Omkar arrives with Tara. Watch the sneak peek of the forthcoming episode and find out more.
#ColorsTV #PinjaraKhubsurtiKa

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Mayura is the epitome of beauty, grace and intelligence, but the world only sees her beauty. Trapped in a cage by a society that judges by looks, Mayura yearns for her freedom to fly free. What happens to her fight for individuality when she ends up in a marriage with Omkar, a control freak obsessed with her beauty? Will he ever see his wife beyond her physical form? Will Mayura ever fulfil her own dreams? Or will she remain trapped in her beautiful pinjaraa for life?

DUDE is based on a life of a detective who manages to outwit the criminals with his common sense and logic. With suspicious acts going on, while he decides to investigate the case, he ends up unfolding his owns life mystery. 
 
#DUDES1​ #WebSeries​ #Episode03

Connect with #theAlrightSquad here
FB: https://www.facebook.com/TheAlrightSquad

Apoorva Arora: https://www.instagram.com/apooarora/?igshid=du0hvtjh79dn 
Shibani Bedi: https://www.instagram.com/shibani_bedi/?hl=en 

Dude web show Season 1 
If you liked movies like Byomkesh Bakshi, then you would also like the Dude Season 1, Episode03. Dude web show features Shibani Bedi, Ambrish Verma, Apoorva Arora, Chote Miyan, Shibani Bedi, Rakesh Bedi. 


About Ambrish Verma 
Ambrish Verma is a popular digital face that has been featured in various stand-alone episodes and web shows across leading fiction channels like RVCJ, The Timeliners, Hasley India etc. Ambrish Verma has written sketches like Luckiest Man in the World for Timeliners. DUDE showcases his first directorial and writing marvel. Ambrish Verma also plays the main lead in this new web series. If you like watching indian web series and hindi web series then you would also like to watch Ambrish Verma in Dude. If you like watching Ambrish Verma videos then you should definitely watch Wrong Number too. Stay tuned to Rusk studios for more such Ambrish Verma videos. 

About Apoorva Arora 
Starring in College Romance, Apoorva Arora is one of the most sought-after faces of YouTube. Dude season 1 is Apoorva’s first web show with Alright (rusk media). If you liked the #wrongnumber, #collegeromance, like dude web show. If you like watch indian web series and hindi web series then you would also like to watch Apoorva Arora in Dude. Apoorva is featured in many other ambrish verma videos as well from RVCJ.

About Chote Miyan 
Chote Miyan or Arun Kushwaha is an Indian actor, comedian, and YouTuber. Chote Miyan is famous for TVF Qtiyapa, Chote Miyan video, and Teen Screen Patti video. Dude web show trailer features Shibani Bedi, Ambrish Verma, Apoorva Arora, Chote Miyan, Shibani Bedi, Rakesh Bedi. If you like watch indian web series and hindi web series then you would also like to watch Chote Miyan in Dude.

About Shibani Bedi 
Shibani Bedi is a Delhi-based theater and web/TV/film actor and has acted in several viral videos, ad films, short films, done a bunch of stage plays, and short cameos. Shibani is also a voice-over artist and an ex-journalist. If you like watch indian web series and hindi web series then you would also like to watch Shibani Bedi in Dude. This is the first time Shibani Bedi has been featuring in any of the Ambrish verma videos which makes DUDE even more special for us.

Why is Dude special for Rusk Studios? 
Rusk Studios is your one-stop-shop for fiction content. With a group of bright and hardworking team, Rusk believes in bringing you the most relatable content for free. Dude is a Delhi-based fiction story that we believe needs to be heard and seen by everyone. Ambrish verma videos have always been fav to our audience. If you liked watching college romance, wrong number, and #roohi, then you would love watching Dude web show by rusk studios.

Dude web show trailer features Shibani Bedi, Ambrish Verma, Apoorva Arora, Chote Miyan, Shibani Bedi, Rakesh Bedi. If you like watch indian web series and hindi web series then you would also like to watch Chote Miyan in Dude.

About Shibani Bedi 
Shibani Bedi is a Delhi-based theater and web/TV/film actor and has acted in several viral videos, ad films, short films, done a bunch of stage plays, and short cameos. Shibani is also a voice-over artist and an ex-journalist. If you like watch indian web series and hindi web series then you would also like to watch Shibani Bedi in Dude. This is the first time Shibani Bedi has been featuring in any of the Ambrish verma videos which makes DUDE even more special for us.

Why is Dude special for Rusk Studios? 
Rusk Studios is your one-stop-shop for fiction content. With a group of bright and hardworking team, Rusk believes in bringing you the most relatable content for free. Dude is a Delhi-based fiction story that we believe needs to be heard and seen by everyone. Dude web show is one of the best Hindi web series 2021, new web series 2021, Indian web series trailer, best web series 2021 similar from the binge, #jiostudios, #Bollywood, webseries, Hindi films, #entertainment, #Maddockfilms. Ambrish verma videos have always been fav to our audience. If you liked watching college romance, wrong number, and #roohi, then you would love watching Dude web show by rusk studios.

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.
 
#Puthiyathalaimurai  #PuthiyathalaimuraiNews #PuthiyathalaimuraiTv #PuthiyathalaimuraiLatestNews

snippet.description:
Watch the latest Episode of the New Malayalam Serial #Indulekha that airs on Surya TV.
 
Watch your favorite serials Free on Sun NXT, immediately after TV. Offer Valid till 25th Mar 2021

#Indulekha #SuryaTV #MalayalamSerial

Indulekha is a family drama serial on Surya TV. The story is about a girl, Indulekha who faces the untimely death of her father, loss of their vast wealth and forced out of their huge home, along with her mother and sister, all on her wedding day. Follow Indulekha, on her journey of survival as she rises from the ashes, to regain her family’s lost glory and reclaim what is rightfully hers.

snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Kanyadaan" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Kanyadaan: Synopsis : Kanyadan is a story of a father Anjan Basu - a History teacher and his five daughters. After his wife’s demise, Anjan Basu had always been the guiding light & the support system to his daughters’ life, which paved its way even after they got married. He has always guarded his daughters with all his principles & ideals, through all the complexities of life and lead them with love to get them through and survive. The story revolves around the lives of these characters and their journey.

snippet.title: சிவராத்திரி 4 கால பூஜைகள் & விரத முறைகள்| Sivarathiri | Maha Shivratri 2021 | Shivaratri vratham
snippet.description:
சிவபுராணம் தினமும் கேட்பதற்காக தமிழ் & ஆங்கில வரிகளுடன் | Sivapuranam in my voice with lyrics
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MiRay98qWCY

சிவராத்திரி விரதம் இருக்கும் முறை, செய்ய வேண்டிய 4 கால பூஜைகள், அபிஷேகங்கள், அர்ச்சனைகள், நெய்வேத்தியம், படிக்க வேண்டிய பதிகங்கள், பூஜை செய்ய வேண்டிய நேரம் என அனைத்து தகவல்களையும் திருமதி. தேச மங்கையர்க்கரசி அம்மா அவர்கள் இந்த வீடியோவில் விளக்கமாக பதிவிட்டுள்ளார். 

சிவராத்திரி விரதம் மேற்கொள்ளும் உங்கள் நண்பர்கள் மற்றும் உறவினர்களுக்கு இந்த வீடியோவை ஷேர் செய்து அவர்களும் அறியும்படி செய்யுங்கள்.  

- ஆத்ம ஞான மையம்

snippet.title: Farmers Protest: Bengal में BJP का विरोध करेंगे किसान, बोले- "हम जिताते हैं तो हराते भी हैं"
snippet.description:
Farmers Protest: कृषि कानूनों (Farm Laws) का विरोध कर रहे किसान अब पश्चिम बंगाल के चुनावी मैदान में कूदने की तैयारी कर रहे हैं. पिछले कई दिनों से किसान अपनी मांगों को लेकर दिल्ली की अलग-अलग सीमाओं पर डटे हुए हैं. सरकार से बातचीत के बावजूद गतिरोध बना हुआ है. अब किसान उन राज्यों में जाएंगे, जहां विधानसभा चुनाव होने जा रहे हैं. किसानों का जत्था 12 से 14 मार्च तक बीजेपी के खिलाफ पश्चिम बंगाल में कई बड़े कार्यक्रम आयोजित करने जा रहा है. देखिए हमारे सहयोगी सौरभ शुक्ला की ये रिपोर्ट...

NDTV India is a 24-hour Hindi news channel. NDTV India established its image as one of India's leading credible news channels, and is a preferred channel by an audience which favours high quality programming and news, rather than sensational infotainment.  

NDTV India's popular shows revolve around: news, politics, economy, sports, panel discussions with eminent personalities and noteworthy commentaries.

NDTV इंडिया भारत का सबसे निष्पक्ष और विश्वसनीय हिंदी न्यूज़ चैनल है. NDTV इंडिया पर आप पॉलिटिक्स, बिजनेस, स्पोर्ट्स और बॉलीवुड से जुड़ी ताज़ा ख़बरें देख सकते हैं. सबसे निष्पक्ष और विश्वसनीय लाइव ख़बरों के लिए हमारे साथ बने रहें.

snippet.title: JJP MLA बबली को बोलने नहीं दिया, बोले: ये कौन होते हैं, दुष्यंत-नैना सुनते रहे, मैं इस्तीफा दे दूंगा
snippet.description: हरियाणा विधानसभा में टोहाना से जेजेपी विधायक देवेंदर बबली को नहीं बोलने नहीं दिया, बोले बबली: ये कौन होते हैं, मैं इस्तीफा दे दूंगा, दुष्यंत चौटाला और नैना सिंह चुपचाप देखते रहे, ड्रामा न करो किसान के नाम पर, इस्तीफा मैं दे दूंगा, देखिये ये वीडियो
